_README: PROJECT ADAPTER. This is the ONLY file you must fill in per project. The generic agents/hooks read it. Leave a value as an empty string to mark a gate 'not configured' (it will be skipped, not failed). See docs/GETTING_STARTED.md and docs/PROMPTS.md.

modules.name: contracts
modules.description: Foundry project: sample interconnected Solidity contracts used as deployment fixtures. Solidity 0.8.28.

modules.name: core
modules.description: @redeploy/core — deployment engine over Hardhat Ignition: declarative spec, dependency resolution/ordering, idempotent journal-based resume. Base package; introduce no cycles.

modules.name: config
modules.description: @redeploy/config — post-deployment configuration: declarative steps, resumable partial configuration, config-state idempotency. Builds on core.

modules.name: verify
modules.description: @redeploy/verify — source/bytecode verification (Etherscan/Sourcify) + on-chain assertion that live configuration matches the declared spec.

modules.name: reader
modules.description: @redeploy/reader — read-only library exposing deployment + config state via a typed API to external systems. Builds on core.

modules.name: studio
modules.description: @redeploy/studio — visual tool (React + React Flow): drag-and-drop authoring of connections/config (emits spec files) + deployment inspector (reads via reader).

gates._note: Exact shell commands for this repo. Run from repo root. Empty string = skip. TS via pnpm/vitest, Solidity via forge. test_affected currently runs the full suite (pnpm has no cheap affected filter here); refine later. TS lint (eslint) and slither are not wired yet — see the tooling ticket.

review._consensus_note: 'all' = every lens must approve; or an integer = that many approvals required. Solidity work leans hard on the security lens (reentrancy/access/overflow).

budget._note: Opus to coordinate/review, Sonnet to build, Haiku to explore. Start at 2 parallel workers; raise only when review+merge keeps up.
